raw_responses.query: arxiv 2025 LLM agent dynamic context gating multi-signal aperture budget

results.title: The Silicon Mirror: Dynamic Behavioral Gating for Anti-Sycophancy in LLM Agents
results.snippet: Behavioral Access Control (BAC) system restricts context layer access based on real-time sycophancy risk scores; dynamic behavioral gating for LLM agents.

results.title: Tool Attention Is All You Need: Dynamic Tool Gating and Lazy Schema Loading
results.snippet: Tool Attention generalizes attention from tokens to gated attention over tools, combining Intent Schema Overlap (ISO) score from sentence embeddings with state-aware gating function and two-phase lazy schema loader. Reduces per-turn tool tokens by 95%, raises effective context utilization from 24% to 91%.

results.title: Multi-Layered Memory Architectures for LLM Agents
results.snippet: Multi-Layer Memory Framework decomposes dialogue into working, episodic, semantic layers with adaptive retrieval gating and retention regularization.

results.title: Controlling Performance and Budget of a Centralized Multi-agent LLM System with Reinforcement Learning
results.snippet: RL-based control of performance and budget in centralized multi-agent LLM systems.

results.title: Dynamic Generation of Multi LLM Agents Communication Topologies with Graph Diffusion Models
results.snippet: Guided Topology Diffusion for adaptive sparse efficient agent communication topologies.
